title: 廢土豆丨FOUtil
description: 一個專門設計給廢土伺服器的模組丨A Utility Mod for mcFallout.net Server
body:
![Image](https://i.imgur.com/Pdlqz4B.png) ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/35J9NXyW?logo=modrinth&label=Downloads) ![Modrinth Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/35J9NXyW?style=flat&logo=modrinth&label=Game%20versions)
English

About

  • This mod is mainly designed for mcFallout.net server
  • Sorting and categorizing chat channels in the server
  • Some tweaks for capture/release mob
  • Make some inventory item tweak mod like Item Scroller can function normally

關於本模組

  • 本模組主要適用於 mcFallout.net 伺服器
  • 伺服器內聊天頻道分類
  • 生物收納器優化
  • 使模組如 Item Scroller，能正常移動含有相同內容的界伏盒
